title: bouteloua scabra
intro: Bouteloua scabra, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America, characterized by its blue-green foliage and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua scabra include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua scabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
